productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Clima Mid Blue Shoes
description: When only the most stylish footwear-option will do choose these Clima mid tops from adidas. The high-tech breathable sole will ensure your feet stay cool while you're shooting hoops on the Basketball court. Upper Synthetic leather upper with overlays for maximum durability and style Perforations on the sidefoot for ventilation Meshed and pushily padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit with velcro strap at ankle for support Midsole Moulded EVA midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection OrthoLite performance insoles giving 'comfort from the inside out' Insole wicks away moisture, inhibits odour and fungus and ensures air flow to keep your feet cool Outsole Durable non-marking rubber outsole diagonal pattern lattice for absolute grip and easy movement Outsole and midsole have airways to allow the sole of your foot to breathe shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
